decision: Loki consolidation Phase 3 — monitor, harden, document single observability stack

steps.action: 24h monitoring validation — verify shared Promtail covers all containers with no log gaps
steps.notes: Monitoring validated. 5/6 non-infra containers confirmed in shared Loki (webvowl is silent by nature). 8 infra containers dropped by design. App logging 69K entries/30min — no gaps. mailhog excluded (not on observability-network, dev-only). Coverage baseline documented.

steps.action: Docker-compose audit — resource limits and persistence config for single-stack reliability
steps.notes: Docker-compose audit complete. Applied: (1) resource limits on all 8 containers (total cap ~2GB), (2) alertmanager persistence volume + pinned to v0.26.0, (3) promtail position tracking volume. Failure mode analysis documented. All containers verified healthy with limits.

steps.action: Single-stack documentation — update infra docs and failure mode playbook
steps.notes: Updated README (8 containers, resource limits, 3 alert rule files, directory structure). Updated ALERTING.md (alertmanager live, routing table, persistence). Created FAILURE-PLAYBOOK.md (8 failure scenarios, recovery procedures, dashboard/port reference, WF-007 summary).
